immutable_core.semantic_definition: A patient-level standardized sex category derived from a database-authoritative patient demographic source, retaining a governed source-specific normalization rule and explicit grain caution.
immutable_core.same_name_cross_database_rule: Any database asset published as std_sex must preserve a patient-level source-standardized sex-like administrative category and must not silently change into gender identity, race, ethnicity, admission sex, diagnosis, or phenotype truth.

admin_demographic_contract.identifier_scope_rule: retain one row per patient-level subject_id under the source database identifier system
admin_demographic_contract.source_authority_rule: use the database-authoritative patient demographic table for the mapping; do not infer from diagnoses, procedures, notes, or encounter-level repeats
admin_demographic_contract.normalization_rule: map approved source sex-like encodings into the retained domain female/male when source support is sufficiently narrow; do not force-map unclear values without review
admin_demographic_contract.no_row_interpretation: no retained row or null retained value means no approved patient-level sex category under the source rule, not a biological assertion

execution_governance.formal_output_rule: Formal std_sex outputs should go through execution.py reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec.
